case_title: BODINGTON, JEFF vs. AGAMOV, ANDREY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BODINGTON, JEFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGAMOV, ANDREY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3215 CLEMENT STREET, APARTMENT #203, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, .TIPULATED----SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODINGTON, JEFF AS TO DEFENDANT AGAMOV, ANDREY RUDENKO, SOFIAY M. AKA SOFIAY M. AGAMOV DOES I-X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT AGAMOV, ANDREY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODINGTON, JEFF
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT RUDENKO, SOFIAY M. AKA SOFIAY M. AGAMOV
EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AGAMOV, ANDREY
